articles.title: Trump says he’s called off Iran strike planned for Tuesday at request of Gulf allies
articles.description:

summary: Trump canceled a planned strike on Iran originally set for Tuesday.

Local Boston residents may see shifts in geopolitical stability affecting oil prices.

articles.title: 21-year-old woman charged after wrong-way crash with N.H. State Police cruiser
articles.description:

summary: A 21-year-old woman was charged after crashing into a N.H. State Police cruiser.

The trooper's actions prevented potential injuries to other drivers on the road.

articles.title: Franklin Park Zoo is getting two new gorillas as Little Joe heads to Pittsburgh
articles.description:

summary: Franklin Park Zoo will welcome two new gorillas later this year.

Little Joe's departure to Pittsburgh creates space for new gorilla exhibits.
